name: Deba Priyo Guha
summary: A passionate research enthusiast and machine learning practitioner specializing in astronomical data science and deep learning applications. Strong foundation in competitive programming, problem-solving, and interdisciplinary research bridging astrophysics and artificial intelligence.

Demonstrated leadership in academic organizations and commitment to STEM education through olympiad participation, tutoring, and mentorship. Focused on developing interpretable AI frameworks for scientific discovery, particularly in radio astronomy and astronomical transient classification.

Experienced in full research pipeline from data preprocessing to manuscript preparation, with expertise in handling large-scale astronomical datasets and multimodal AI systems. Active contributor to competitive programming communities and AI training platforms.
Selected for Bangladesh National Team for International Olympiad on Astronomy & Astrophysics (IOAA 2017).

primary: Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Astrophysics
specific: Interpretable AI frameworks for scientific discovery
Radio Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN) morphological classification
Visual Large Language Models for multi-wavelength galaxy characterization
Generative models for data augmentation in scientific imaging

languages.name: Bengali
languages.note: Full professional proficiency in reading, writing, and speaking

languages.name: Hindi
languages.note: Advanced listening and speaking; comfortable in informal contexts; limited formal writing

interests.desc: Practicing for physical fitness, discipline, and self-defense; completed Self Defence Training at Chittagong Kick-Boxing Wushu Academy (CKBWUA)

interests.desc: Active competitive member at CTG Archery Club; 5th position at 2nd Chittagong Open Archery Championship; Trainer for newcomers and national preparation (Jan 2026–Present)
